About La J's

More than a salon visit, it's a personalised experience

At La J's Hair Studio, the focus is simple: create a space where you can relax, feel comfortable and walk out with hair that feels like you, just elevated. The studio is ideal for colour refreshes, treatment days, precision cuts and polished occasion styling.

💇

Versatile hair services

From ladies styling and colour work to gent cuts, treatments and bridal finishes.

⏱️

Instant online booking

Secure your appointment quickly through Fresha with simple, convenient scheduling.

🚗

Easy, comfortable visit

Kid-friendly, parking available and easy to find at 17A Baxter Street in Bethlehem.

⭐

Trusted local reputation

A 5.0 Fresha rating and glowing local feedback for polished results and warm service.

Signature results for every kind of hair day

Whether you're after sleek polish, soft bridal movement or a bold colour refresh, La J's Hair Studio delivers finishes that feel modern, clean and confidence-boosting.
